text:
There once was an old crab. He lived an ordinary life.

One sunny day, he saw some beautiful butterflies dancing in the flowers.

That fascinated him.

He decided to chase them.

No luck.

They flew too high.

So he just looked.

Soon enough, his shell broke.

Then he saw the sky.

Nothing interested him.

Maybe birds?

He caught one.

His hole!

That night.

He dreamed.

Stars.

Tomorrow.

Maybe sky stuff?

That owl likes worms.

Night owl.
